who: logistics carriers managing 10-50 deliveries per day
offer: For logistics carriers processing 10-50 deliveries per day, inefficient route planning causes delayed deliveries. We optimize delivery routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient delivery routes leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums sharing logistics tools and tips
try_it: Let users try route optimization on 1-3 deliveries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual route planning
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing delivery data
One-click export of simple trip reports
Fewer steps in user onboarding process
